authoring_mode: Pinned PyTex CIF synthesized from COD structure parameters and the standard layered R-3m hexagonal-setting prototype used for NiCl2.
redistribution: COD data are dedicated to the public domain under CC0; acknowledge the original structural-data authors.
citation: Wyckoff, R. W. G. Crystal Structures, Vol. 1. Interscience Publishers, 1963.
notes: The fixture id is kept as 'nicl' to match the requested starter corpus, while the crystallographic phase stored here is NiCl2.
